text: Newly promoted, Nex is sent to inspect a company chicken coop. The moment he arrives, a group of workers — visibly corrupted by a greed spirit — surrounds him demanding bonuses. He politely declines. The protest turns violent.

speaker: Kelly
text: A carton of eggs falls and makes a metallic clank. Nex pockets one egg. That evening Kelly cracks it open: pure silver inside. The entire coop is a silver laundering front — the largest supply anyone has seen since the Silver War.
